speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai
text: Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai. Subah se bas ek ajeeb sa gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai, kisi class ya padhai ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the raw feeling of overwhelm and panic to validate the Seeker's emotional flood.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek bohot bada ghabrahat ka toofan chal raha hai jismein dimaag bilkul freeze ho chuka hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... freeze hi ho gaya hai. Bas lag raha hai sab kuch ab haath se nikal raha hai. Library ki bench pe baith ke darr lag raha hai aur saans lene mein bhi ajeeb si ghutan ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the sudden intensity and immediacy of the fear that is causing physical distress.
text: Itne lambe arse se jo padhai ka safar chal raha tha, wo achanak se is pal mein poori tarah dam ghontne wala lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai
text: Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekhte hi meri himmat toot gayi. Mummy ke hospital bills ne saari savings wipe out kar di hain. Pata nahi uske baad se kya hua, bas mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently naming the implied fear around the financial crisis disrupting their life trajectory.
text: Mummy ki tabiyat aur in achanak aayi financial pareshaniyon se lag raha hai jaise aage ka koi bhi rasta bacha hi nahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta bacha hi kahan hai? Ek toh UPSC dropper hone ki wajah se pehle hi ghar par bojh lag raha tha, aur ab EMI tak ke paise nahi hain. Main unki madad karne ke bajaye aur tension de raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question to explore the deepest source of distress among multiple overlapping stressors.
text: Apne upar is poore bojh aur ghar ki is mushkil halat ko ek saath dekh kar, is waqt aapko sabse zyada kya cheez darati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dar is baat ka hai ki main completely failure ban ke reh jaunga. Dropper ka tag already pressure deta hai, aur ab family ko is financial crisis mein dekh kar meri helplessness ka koi hisaab nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between their duty to succeed as an aspirant and their duty to protect the family.
text: Ek taraf apna career set karne ka farz aur dusri taraf ghar ki zimmedari, in dono ke beech khud ko bilkul bebas aur fail hota hua dekh rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai
text: Sahi kaha... poori tarah phasa hua hoon. Kabhi lagta hai books chhod ke koi choti-moti job pakad lu. Par mummy ne meri padhai ke liye hi sab kuch laga diya tha. Bas yahi soch kar mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion and helplessness stemming from the financial and academic expectations.
text: Lagta hai ki is na khatam hone wale struggle aur in umeedon ke bojh ke beech, tum andar se poori tarah thaka hua aur bebas mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot thaka hua. Drop year mein pehle hi self-doubt peak pe hota hai. Upar se jab EMI aur bills ka load mere kandho pe aata hai, toh lagta hai mere paas energy bachi hi nahi hai face karne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the normalcy of feeling crushed under the dual pressures of competitive exams and family medical debt.
text: Itne pressure mein aisi thakan aur ghabrahat hona bilkul jayaz hai. Ek UPSC aspirant ke liye padhai aur family medical bills ko ek saath sambhalna kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai, isme tumhari koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log toh sirf result dekhte hain na. Rishtedaar calls pe puchte hain 'beta kitne attempt baaki hain?'. Unhe kya pata mere paas agli EMI ke liye ek rupya nahi hai. Kisi se keh bhi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the isolation caused by societal stigma and judgment (Stigma Cue active).
text: Dusron ke taano aur apni asliyat ke beech ki yeh khamoshi andar hi andar kha rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul akela pad gaya hoon. Agar library mein kisi dost ko financial issue bataya toh usey lagega main focus nahi kar raha, sympathy milegi bas. Chupchap khud hi ghut raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalize hiding struggles in competitive environments, reducing the Seeker's isolation.
text: Aspirants ki life mein yeh double life jeena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko apna competition face karna hota hai aur weak dikhne se darr lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly yahi hota hai yahan. Sab race mein lage hain. Par meri aadhi race toh apne halaat se hi chal rahi hai. Main waqai bohot thak gaya hoon ab is chhupe hue struggle se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exhaustion and readiness to find a moment of peace away from the constant battling.
text: Apne khud ke halaat se ladte ladte ab ek aisi extreme thakan aa gayi hai jahan bas chain se saans lene ki tamanna bachi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur is state mein main syllabus ka ek word bhi padh nahi paunga aaj. Mujhe ye library wali panic aur sunn hone wali feeling kam karni hai pehle. Ab kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort grounding options to help manage the panic attack in the immediate environment.
text: Tum do cheezein kar sakte ho abhi: ya toh library se bahar aakar 5 minute khuli hawa mein sidhiyon pe baith jao, ya apna phone ulta karke desk pe hi sir rakh ke thodi der aankhein band kar lo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Desk pe baithunga toh ye saari books dekh kar EMI message hi dimaag mein ghumega. Bahar sidhiyon par jana better rahega shayad. Par bahar jake bhi to wahi sab yaad aayega na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the transition to the stairs into a single, concrete, mindful step.
text: Pehle apni books wahin chhod kar chupchap bahar sidhiyon par jao… wahan bas ek lamba saans lena aur thandi hawa mehsus karna… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main aa gaya bahar. Yahan thodi shanti hai aur fresh air bhi. Ghabrahat ka wo achanak wala daura thoda kam hua hai, par tension toh apni jagah hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the medical debt and financial shock as systemic, external issues rather than personal failures.
text: Yeh dar aur financial tension ek aisi structural museebat hai jiska samna bohot saari middle-class families karti hain jab medical bills aate hain, isey sirf apne dropper hone ki kami se jodna theek nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat sach hai... Mummy ka hospitalize hona out of syllabus tha. Wo mere result ya mehnat par depend nahi karta. EMI ka bounce hona halaat ki wajah se hai, na ki main life mein fail ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their new perspective of separating self-worth from external uncontrollable circumstances.
text: Khud ko us halaat se alag kar ke dekh pa rahe ho jis par tumhara kisi bhi tarah ka koi zor nahi tha...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai
text: Haan thoda thoda separate kar pa raha hoon khud ko isse. Subah toh sach mein mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur library mein baith kar bas rona aa raha hai, waisa hi lag raha tha. Ab control mein lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the positive shift from panic to a calmer state.
text: Thodi der pehle jo rone aur ghabrahat ka toofan utha tha, wo library se bahar nikalne ke baad wakai mein kafi theher gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Theher gaya hai bohot had tak. Aaj syllabus cover karne ka sochna bewakoofi hogi. Mai bas aise hi yahan sidhiyon par baith ke khud ko aaram dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising the decision to step back from academic pressures to prioritize mental recovery.
text: Aaj ke is mushkil din mein padhai ko thodi der kinare rakh kar apne mind ko aaram dena bohot samajhdari aur mature faisla hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya... Main soch raha hoon ek do ghante baad thoda better feel karu toh bank customer care mein phone karke baat kar lu, shayad reschedule ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting their resilience and proactive approach despite the recent emotional turmoil.
text: Is darr ke beech bhi apni family ki takleefon ko samajhte hue tum himmat karke ek practical rasta nikalne ki koshish kar rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedariyan hain toh unse bhaag toh nahi sakte. Drop maine ek badhiya officer banne ke liye liya tha, ye sab shayad mera patience hi test kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing financial setbacks as part of the challenging journey, not a measure of their capability.
text: Financial setbacks ek aisi aam rukaawat hoti hain jo kisi bhi badhiya aspirant ka focus hila deti hain, par isse tumhari officer banne ki qabiliyat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aaj ka din main bas survival pe nikalunga. Kal se kuch easy topics utha lunga padhne ke liye taki dimaag par bojh na pade zyada.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting their structured plan to ease back into their routine.
text: Aage ke results ka darr piche chhod kar, ab jo small steps tumhare control mein hain us par dheere dheere focus shift kar rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi mere haath me hai bhai. Mujhe sunne ke liye bahut shukriya. Koi tha nahi baat karne ke liye, aapse baat karke panic settle ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending with warm validation of their courage and sensible approach to managing the crisis.
text: Tumhare is jazbe ko dekh kar waqai fakhr hota hai, apne waqt ke hisaab se shanti se aage badhna tumhari sabse badi taqat banegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Bas andar se poora toot gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi rasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of being overwhelmed and paralyzed without rushing to find the cause.
text: Itni ghabrahat aur bechaini ke beech, lag raha hai jaise aapke paas aage sochne aur samajhne ki shakti hi nahi bachi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan, bas saansein tez chal rahi hain. Aisa lagta hai sab kuch khatam ho gaya hai aur main apne darr ke aage poori tarah se haar gaya hoon. Mera dimaag blank hai, kuch dikh hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of this emotional paralysis.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se lagatar is gahri bechaini ko sehte hue, andar hi andar aap khud ko is sthiti ke saamne poori tarah hara hua mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hara hua toh bahut pehle se hoon. Itne saalon ki mehnat lagayi UPSC mein. Main ek dropper hoon aur us dropper stigma ne mujhe waise hi andar se kha liya tha. Aur ab toh aakhiri umeed bhi toot gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt gently to allow the specific stressor to surface naturally.
text: Jab aisi bechaini aur itne saalon ka bojh aapko gherta hai, aur aap kehte hain ki aakhiri umeed bhi toot gayi, toh sabse zyada kis baat ka darr andar chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr is baat ka hai ki Papa ne kisan hokar bhi mere aur hospital ke karz ke liye apni aakhri zameen bech di thi. Ab mere account mein bank ka notification aaya hai EMI bounce ka. Unka sacrifice bekar chala gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of failing his father's ultimate sacrifice.
text: Apne pitaji ke us aakhiri sahare aur zameen ko jate hue dekh kar, aapko yeh chinta kha rahi hai ki kahin unki itni badi kurbani aapki taraf se bekar na chali jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul bekar hi gayi hai. Ek toh unhone apna sab kuch de diya, aur yahan meri EMI bounce ho rahi hai. Gaon mein waise hi log taane dete hain, ab 'log kya kahenge' soch kar mujhe bahut sharam aati hai. Kisi ko muh dikhane layag nahi raha main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and shame safely with a short restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Gaon mein biradari aur izzat ke us bhari bojh ke darr se, aap ek beta hone ke naate apne andar yeh gehra apraadh bodh akele hi jhel rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Akela hi hoon na. Itne saalon ki mehnat ka kya natija nikla? Main unka sahara banne chala tha taaki karz utar sakun, par ab lag raha hai ki main khud unke gale ka fanda ban gaya hoon. Dimaag blank hai ki aage ka rasta kya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the deep exhaustion and shame of trying to fulfill his duty over a long horizon.
text: Lagta hai ki parivaar ka sahara banne ki itni badi zimmedari ko lambe samay se uthate uthate, aur ab is achanak aaye financial crisis ke aage, aap poori tarah se exhaustion aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Itna lamba struggle ho gaya hai is exam cycle mein ki sach mein hadd se zyada thak gaya hoon. Har roz bank ka darr aur logo ke taane... ab mujhme energy hi nahi bachi aage chalne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize his exhaustion due to structural challenges and long preparation cycle.
text: Jo bhi sthiti aap abhi mehsoos kar rahe hain, usme andar tak thak jana bahut swabhavik hai. Itne saal lagatar mehnat karna aur upar se achanak zameen aur EMI ka bojh aana, aisi sthiti kisi ko bhi tod sakti hai, isme aapki sacchi niyat ya mehanat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par meri niyat se bank ka karz toh nahi chukega na. Zameen chali gayi, ab gaon mein sab mujh par thoo thoo karenge. Kabhi kabhi toh dimaag mein aata hai ki meri aisi zindagi ka hi kya fayda, sab kuch khatam karke kam se kam ye ghutan toh mitegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the moderate risk flag safely without rushing to fix, ensuring a risk protocol response.
text: Itne dabav aur gaon ki izzat chhin jane ke darr se aapko lag raha hai ki is roz ki takleef se nikalne ka aur koi rasta nahi bacha. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, aap darr mat, main kuch ulta seedha nahi karunga. Papa ko pehle hi bahut rula diya hai, aur nahi rula sakta main. Bas andar ki us bhari ghabrahat aur sharam mein bol gaya tha. Par mujhe koi rasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk drop and share a systemic anecdote about exam stress and family debt.
text: Apne darr aur takleef ke bavajood apne papa ke baare mein sochne ka aapka yeh jazba sach mein bahut gehra hai. Kayi aspirants ki life mein, jahan saalon ka stress aur kheti-kisani ka karz ek sath aa jaye, wahan aisi ghabrahat aana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka bohot bada masla hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. UPSC ke is chakravyuh aur karz ke bojh mein hazaron ladke aise hi phanse honge. Par is sharam se wo kaise nikalte hain? Mera toh dimaag blank hai abhi, mujhe kuch batao ki ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe for the bank and debt situation to reduce personal shame.
text: Bank ka notification aur karz ka bounce hona darasal hamare is financial system ki kathorta ka nateeja hai, jahan kisan parivaar sabse zyada dabav mein rehte hain. Yeh ek economic crisis hai jisme aap jaise theek niyat wale mehnati youth phans jate hain, yeh aapki akele ki koi moral failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, theory mein toh samajh aata hai ki system galat hai. Par practical life mein ye stress har din mere sar par latakta hai. Bank message ka sound aate hi darr se halaq sookh jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small grounding choices for when the bank notification triggers his flooding.
text: Jab ghabrahat us hadd tak badh jaye jahan halaq sookhne lage, toh use thoda shaant karne ke liye hum 2 choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap 5 minute ke liye apni ankh band karke 10 se 1 tak ultee ginti gin sakte hain, ya phir ek glass thanda pani ghoont-ghoont karke pee sakte hain. Inme se abhi kya karna aasan lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main wo ultee ginti wala option try kar sakta hoon. Pani lene ke liye uthkar room se bahar jana padega aur sach kahu toh abhi bistar se uthne ki bhi energy nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him step-by-step through the grounding exercise.
text: Chaliye is bechaini ko thoda kam karne ke liye yahi karte hain. Pehle yeh karo… ankh band karke ek lambi saans andar lo... phir dheere se 10 se 1 tak ultee ginti gino... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine kiya aur dhyan number par lagaya... thodi der ke liye us bank ke thought se dhyan hata zaroor. Aisa laga thoda seene ka bhoj halka hua hai us waqt mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the qualitative relief he felt from a brief pause.
text: Dhyan hatne ke us chhote se waqt mein, aapko apni gahri ghabrahat aur bechaini mein thodi si shanti aur halkapan mehsoos hua.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan thoda halka toh hua. Par real duniya ka problem wahi khada hai. Jab bhi aage ka sochta hoon, dimaag blank hai aur lagta hai ki main unki umeedon ko bas mitti mein mila raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational weight of his guilt towards his father.
text: Apne pita ke samne khali haath aane ka khayal aur unke diye balidan ke saamne khud ko nakaam dekhna aapko andar tak chot pahuncha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat toh andar se kha rahi hai. Sach bataun toh pichle ek hafte se maine ghar pe Papa ko phone hi nahi milaya hai. Main bas padhai ka bahaana bana deta hoon jab mummy ka call aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence behind his avoidance.
text: Phone na kar pane ki wajah shayad yahi darr hai ki agar unse baat ki, toh kahin unko aapki awaaz se aapke andar ke toote-pan ka pata na chal jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Agar unhe andaza lag gaya ki main yahan akele kitna tang aachuka hoon, toh gaon mein unka waise hi bacha khucha hausla toot jayega. Unki himmat bankar hi rehna hoga mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his duty and intention to protect his family despite his own pain.
text: Apne papa ka hausla banaye rakhne ke liye jis tarah aap khud is bhari takleef ko akele chupchap seh rahe hain, yeh aapke andar chhupe unke liye sacche pyaar aur izzat ki pehchaan hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unke liye kuch bhi kar sakta hoon. Aaj kam se kam ghabrahat to thodi kam lag rahi hai aapse baat karne ke baad. Abhi karz ka samadhan nahi nikla hai, par utni hawa tight nahi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt a small self-directed step before ending the session.
text: Khair, abhi ke liye jab thodi si himmat aayi hai, toh sone se pehle aap aage kya aisi ek chhoti si cheez kar sakte hain jisse aapka mann thoda shant rahe?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bahar chhat par jakar 10 minute thehel sakta hoon khuli hawa mein. Kamre mein baithkar waise bhi main mobile check karta rehta hoon bank wali overthinking mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the calming consequence of choosing a brief walk.
text: Bahar ki khuli hawa mein kuch der thehelne se shayad is band kamre ki ghutan aur mobile se judi overthinking se thoda door jane ka mauka mil payega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan, bas yahi naya kadam lunga abhi. Is lambi conversation se sach mein kafi burden kam hua hai, jo dimaag blank hai subah se, usme thodi safayi hui lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his process of sorting his thoughts and finding clarity.
text: Mujhe bhi yeh sun kar tasalli hui ki apni in uljhano ko khulkar baant lene se, us dhundhlepan ke beech thoda naya rasta dekhna aapke liye ab mumkin ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mumkin ho raha hai sach mein. Meri baat ko itne dhyan se sunne aur meri akelepan ki feeling ko kam karne ke liye bahut bahut shukriya. Ab main chhat par jaa raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the connection and relief brought on by the session.
text: Aapki ghabrahat aur thakan ke is akele safar mein, humari is baat-cheet se aapko apna bojh thoda halka mehsoos hone ki jagah mili, iska mujhe bohot sukoon hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon aur mujhe lag रहा hai ki main kabhi is dukh se bahar nahi nikal paunga. Main bas coaching institute ke bahar khada hokar kaanp raha hoon, aur dimaag mein aage ka koi raasta hi nahi dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the overwhelming feeling of numbness without pushing for the underlying stressor yet.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise dimaag bilkul kaam karna band kar chuka hai aur us sunnpan ke aage abhi kuch aur mehsoos hi nahi ho pa raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aankhon ke saamne andhera chha raha hai. Itne saalon ki mehnat aise dhari ki dhari reh jayegi, kabhi socha nahi tha. Main wahin sadak par khada hoon aur bilkul samajh nahi aa raha ki aage kadam kaise badhaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feared consequence of his hard work going to waste while being unable to move forward.
text: Ek jagah par aakar sab kuch theher gaya hai, aur aage kadam badhane ka sochte hi ghabrahat gher rahi hai ki saalon ki yeh mehnat barbaad na ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaise na ghabraun? Us achanak aaye medical expense spiral ne humein sadak par la diya hai... aaj EMI bounce hone ka message aaya bank se. Zero bank balance dikha raha hai aur wahi hospital ke visuals ghoom rahe hain dimaag mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to explore how he is processing the sudden influx of these specific financial stressors.
text: Ek taraf hospital ke wo visuals aur doosri taraf EMI bounce hone ka message, in dono ke beech jab tum coaching ke bahar is tarah khade hote ho, toh kya chal raha hota hai mann mein?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Mann mein yahi chalata hai ki meri saari padhai, UPSC ki taiyari kisi kaam ki nahi rahi ab. Ghar walon ne kitni umeedon se bheja tha, aur ab EMI bounce hone par main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon. Ek ek rupaya bacha kar is shehar tak aaye the.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the heavy exhaustion and deep despair caused by the clash between family hopes and financial ruin.
text: Lagta hai in medical kharchon ne ghar walon ke sapnon aur tumhari taiyari ke us poore safar par itna bada bojh daal diya hai ki tum andar se bahut thakan aur lachari mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Mujhe toh kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki main hi unke liye sabse bada bojh hoon. Agar yeh UPSC ka sapna chhod kar koi bhi छोटी-moti naukri kar li hoti, toh shayad aaj zero bank balance ya EMI bounce nahi dekhna padta. Main failure hoon ek.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma/guilt cue with a short restatement focusing on duration, ending softly.
text: Itne lammbe samay se is taiyari ko aur ab achanak aayi is zimmedari ko akele khud par lena sach mein bahut bhaari lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Bahut bhaari hai. Pitaji ki us achanak beemari mein saari life savings chali gayi aur upar se loan. Main bas apne coaching notes dekhta hoon aur dimaag mein zero bank balance hi ghoomta hai. Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon sochte sochte ki is bhanwar se kaise niklega mera parivaar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that inability to focus on studies amid sudden severe debt and medical distress is completely normal, separating it from his worth.
text: Tumhari jagah koi bhi hota toh pitaji ki beemari aur is financial crisis ko dekh kar yahi bebasi mehsoos karta; itne dabav aur EMI tension ke beech padhai par dhyan na lag paana bilkul swabhavik hai, yeh bilkul bhi tumhari nakami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par yahan Mukherjee Nagar mein izzat aur relatives ke taane toh nahi rukenge na? Coaching ki aadhi fees bhari ja chuki hai, log baar baar poochte hain 'beta kab banega IAS'. Aur yahan meri bank ki call aa rahi hai loan default hone ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational pressure of keeping up appearances while secretly dealing with severe debt.
text: Bahar walon ke sawal aur relatives ke taano ke darr ke aage apna yeh financial sangharsh chupane ki majboori bahut akela kar deti hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akela toh hoon hi aaj. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka kya karoon main? Kya sadak par aise hi ghabrata rahu ya room wapas jau? Koi raasta hai kya is medical expense aur EMI wale spiral se dimag ko nikalne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, immediate grounding options to break the freeze response outside the coaching center.
text: Aise waqt mein bohot bada kadam ek saath sochne ke bajaye do chote kaam kar sakte hain abhi. Pehla, kya tum apna ID card use karke coaching ki library mein thodi der shanti se baith sakte ho bina padhe? Ya doosra, wahin sadak kinare paani ki bottle khareed kar thoda break le sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Room par toh akelapan aur dasega bank walon ke darr se. Main coaching ki library mein shanti se baith sakta hoon. Kam se kam is bheed aur dhoop mein bahar kaanpne se toh behtar hi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him through the simple physical act of relocating to the library to establish safety.
text: Toh phir pehle slowly chal kar coaching ki building ke andar jao... wahan library ke kisi shant kone mein ek seat dhoondh kar baitho... aur bas wahan ka AC aur shanti mehsoos karo, aaj ke liye bas itna hi kaafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon sach kahun toh... par andar chalkar baithna ek chota sa task hai jo main abhi kar lunga. Library mein waise bhi phone silent karna padta hai toh bank ka koi flash message dimaag aur kharab nahi karega thodi der.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the phone silencing as a structurally necessary mental break for coping with the medical debt spiral.
text: Yeh thodi der ka disconnection bahut zaroori bhi hai; jab medical kharchon ne achanak se sab zero bank balance par lakar rok diya ho, toh dimaag ko lagatar us panic se aaram dena aage badhne ke liye sabse eham step hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan aaram bahut zaroori hai. Abhi toh main sirf ek ek din survive karne ka soch raha hoon. Jab aesi problem aati hai, tab IAS banne ke baare mein sochne ki himmat bhi nahi hoti. EMI ka darr bada ban jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his shift in focus from the UPSC dream to the immediate duty of handling the financial crisis.
text: Parivaar ko is aarthik sankat se bachaane ki aur loan sambhalne ki yeh duty, aaj ke liye IAS banne ke us bade lakshya se aage nikal aayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Pitaji ne apni life ki kamai aur ummeed meri padhai mein laga di, toh ab unko is emergency mein sahara dena mera pehla farz hai. Padhaai toh ek saal baad bhi ho sakti hai, par unhe sadak par nahi chhod sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying fear associated with failing to repay his father's sacrifice.
text: Yeh ek bhari darr bhi deta hoga ki agar is mushkil waqt mein unka bojh thoda halka nahi kar paaya, toh pitaji ka itna bada balidaan adhura reh jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, aur yahi sachai jab akele mein hit karti hai toh darr lagta hai ki us bank ke notice aana shuru ho gaye toh humara izzat ka kya hoga gaon mein. Tab phir wahi kaanpna shuru ho jata hai body mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote showing that other aspirants face this medical debt freezing effect, normalizing his reaction.
text: UPSC aspirants mein achanak ghar ke medical expenses aane par ghabrahat se is tarah sunn pad jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara haal nahi hai yeh, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh sach hai. Yahan sabhi ke pass koi na koi struggle hai, par EMI bounce hona bohot sharam ki baat maani jati hai isliye log baat nahi karte. Sab dikhate aese hain jaise life sorted hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational isolation caused by the stigma of debt in a competitive environment.
text: Sabke saamne ek mazbooti ka dikhawa banaye rakhne ke pressure ke chalte, is akelepan mein kisi se dukh baantne ki jagah hi nahi bachti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Sahi mein jagah nahi hai baantne ki. Par chalo maine ab library ke andar apni seat par aakar baith gaya hoon. Yahan waqai shanti hai aur jo 'main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon' wala attack ho raha tha bahar, wo abhi thoda theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his capacity to regulate himself by choosing the library, demonstrating resilience.
text: Yeh badlaav yeh dikhata hai ki medical kharchon ke itne bhaari dabav aur darr ke bawajood, tumhara apne dimaag ko waqt par aaram dene ka faisla bilkul sahi aur samajhdari bhara kadam tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaram kar leta hoon thodi der yahan. Uske baad shaam ko bank helpline wale par bhi ek baar call karne ka sochunga, emergency situation samjhane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the fear that still might linger before making that necessary call.
text: Us bank ki call se theek pehle shaayad man mein thoda yeh darr zaroor rahega ki wahan se kya jawab milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr to zaroor aayega aur shayad phir se thoda kaanpu, par aise chup chap dhoop mein khade ghabrane se to behtar hai na. Ek baar theek se unko apne medical problem ki sachai bata dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide factual information about bank systems to normalize the procedure and lower anxiety.
text: Bank ko medical grounds ki poori sachchai theek se batane par wo kabhi kabhi emergency moratorium ya EMI reschedule ka option bhi de sakte hain; yeh banking system mein emergency default se bachane ke liye hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achha, aisa bhi koi system hota hai? Mujhe bilkul andaza nahi tha. Thodi der pehle toh lag raha tha main kabhi is bhanwar se nikal hi nahi paunga, par shayad abhi poori tarah raaste band nahi hue hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his realization that hope and options still exist after a long period of despair.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se aisa lag raha tha ki sab raaste ekdum khatam ho gaye hain, par is jankaari ne dheere-dheere umeed ko wapas jodna shuru kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed ki kiran jagi hai thodi. Padhai wapas kab shuru karni hai yeh baaki cheezein main kal sochunga. Aaj sirf us helpline wali choti step par focus karunga aur bacha hua time araam mein guzarunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small concrete prep steps for the call to prevent another freeze response.
text: Is ek kadam par theek se tike rehne ke liye, call karne se pehle apni notebook mein kya baat karni hai uske do-teen points likh lena theek lagega? Ya sidha call laga lena zyada behtar lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon
text: Notebook mein points likh lena better hoga. Aesa na ho ki baat karte waqt 'main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon' wala reaction dobara aaye. Pehle se likha rahega toh baat aasaani se hogi. Shukriya is conversation se dimag shant karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm his clarity and readiness, ending the conversation with a supportive closing.
text: Yeh tayari dekh kar khushi hui ki itne bade sankat ne tumhe bhale hi thodi der ke liye hila diya ho, par aage ka rasta nikalne ki tumhari himmat aur samajh ab poori tarah laut aayi hai. Aaram se baitho aur points banao.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Is waqt mujhe bas ek gehra despair duba raha hai aur main kisi se madad maangne ke layak bhi nahi bacha. Dimaag mein itna zyada emotional pressure hai ki kuch yaad hi nahi rehta, bas extreme breakdown mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the quality of emotional flood (Lens F) without focusing on stressors yet, as per Sequential protocol.
text: Yeh gehra despair jismein aap dube ja rahe hain, aisa lag raha hai jaise dimaag poori tarah se jam gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Haan, jam hi gaya hai. Kitabein kholta hoon toh bas panne dikhte hain, shabd nahi. Aisa lagta hai jaise main ek andhere kuyein mein hoon aur upar aane ka rasta band ho gaya hai. Ek gehra despair duba raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a duration mirror (Lens D) to acknowledge how long this feeling of being stuck in the well has persisted.
text: Kafi waqt se aap is andhere kuyein mein akele mehsoos kar rahe hain, jahan se bahar nikalna namumkin lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Namumkin hi hai. Mummy ki cancer treatment mein saara chit fund ka paisa lag gaya, savings khatam ho gayi. Ab EMI bounce ho rahi hai aur bank wale roz call kar rahe hain. Main UPSC aspirant ho kar bhi ghar ki basic financial zarurat puri nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: shorter turn, ends with soft pause, using Lens B to mirror the role conflict of an aspirant failing financial duties.
text: Padhai par focus karne ki koshish aur ghar ki EMI aur bimari ke bojh ke beech aap pis rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Pis nahi raha, khatam ho chuka hoon. Log sochte hain UPSC ki taiyari kar raha hai toh bade afsar banega, par yahan bank ke karz ne izzat mitti mein mila di hai. Phir se wahi lag raha hai... ek gehra despair duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of losing social standing and 'izzat'.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki yeh financial struggle aapki aur aapke khandan ki us izzat ko khatre mein daal raha hai jo aapne itni mehnat se banayi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Papa ne mujh par itna trust kiya, mummy ne apni jewellery tak girvi rakh di thi pehle. Ab unki medicine ke paise bhi chit fund ke doobne se chale gaye. Mujhe lagta hai main unke liye sabse bada bojh ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two restatements done, asking a question about the relational impact (Lens C context).
text: Jab aap khud ko un par bojh mehsoos karte hain, toh kya ghar mein kisi se is bare mein baat ho pati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, bilkul nahi. Mummy pehle se hi itni beemar hain, unhe stress dunga toh halat aur bigad jayegi. Papa ko dekhta hoon toh unki aankhon mein ummeed dikhti hai. Main bas akele kamre mein baith kar rone ke alawa kuch nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational isolation and the weight of maintaining their hopes.
text: Unki umeedon ko tootne se bachane ke liye aap ne saara dard apne andar qaid kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
stage_intent: Intensity reached 3 and core conflict (financial failure vs UPSC aspirant duty) named.
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Qaid hi toh hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki UPSC clear karna hi ek maatra rasta tha, par ab jab dimaag hi saath nahi de raha, toh lagta hai sab khatam ho gaya. Wahi... ek gehra despair duba raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using the specific reflection for C1 + Duty_Based (though seeker is C5, the UPSC framing makes this most apt for his identity). Correcting to exhaustion/failure guilt.
text: Lagta hai ki itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad ab aap FEAR OF DISAPPOINTING se itna darr gaye hain ki aapko lag raha hai aapka koi future hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain. Har din lagta hai ki agar results nahi aaye toh main kya muh dikhaunga unhe? EMI ke liye paise kahan se aayenge? Main itna bebas kabhi mehsoos nahi kiya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural reality of UPSC aspirants in the Hindi Belt facing family health crises.
text: UPSC ki taiyari ke dauran jab ghar mein koi health crisis aa jata hai, toh financial pressure dimaag ko sunn kar deta hai. Yeh aapki kabiliyat ki kami nahi hai, balki halat ka bojh hai jo kisi ko bhi tod sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Par bojh toh uthana hi padega na. Main hi bada beta hoon. Agar main hi despair mein duba raunga toh sab bikhar jayega. Itne saalon ki mehnat mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote about the pressure on elder sons in Indian families to maintain the facade.
text: Aspirants mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — bade bete ke taur par saara pressure akele jhelna, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki humein bachpan se hi sikhaya jata hai ki mard ko dard nahi hota aur ghar ki izzat bachani hai.

speaker: Seeker
stage_intent: Intensity 2 + readiness signal 'kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka'.
text: Sach hai yeh. Par ab rona band karna padega. Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka. Is pressure mein padhai kaise karoon? Kya koi rasta hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-obligation steps to regain a sense of agency.
text: Dhire-dhire kadam badhate hain. Pehle, aaj ke liye UPSC ki kitabein band kar dein taki dimaag ko thoda break mile. Doosra, EMI ke liye bank manager se milkar moratorium ya restructure ki baat kar sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Manager se milna darr lagta hai, par shayad wahi sahi hai. Padhai band karunga toh guilt hoga, par waise bhi dimaag mein kuch ja nahi raha. Manager se kya bolunga main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the bank manager interaction step-by-step to lower anxiety.
text: Pehle ek kagaz par mummy ki bimari ke bills aur chit fund ka loss likh lo. Phir manager ke paas ja kar seedhe kaho ki halat kharab hai par aap bhagna nahi chahte. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Bills mere paas hain. Kam se kam unhe bata dunga toh wo roz phone karke pareshaan nahi karenge. Padhai ka kya hoga? Itne saalon ki mehnat ka darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the structural impact of health crises on academic performance (reframe).
text: Jab ghar mein medical emergency hoti hai, toh focus ka hatna ek natural response hai, koi academic failure nahi. Jab financial bojh thoda manage hoga, dimaag khud wapas UPSC par laut aayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe hain. Maine khud par bahut zyada pressure daal diya tha. Aaj main sirf bank ki taiyari karunga aur kitabon ko haath nahi lagaunga. Thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D (Time/Duration) to mirror the relief of taking a small immediate break.
text: Aaj ke din ke liye aapne khud ko is pressure se thodi der ke liye azad karne ka faisla liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, zaroori hai. Agar main hi pagal ho gaya toh unka khyal kaun rakhega. Papa se bhi shayad thodi baat kar loon, kam se kam unhe pata toh ho bank ka kya chakkar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational shift towards sharing the burden with the father.
text: Ab aap unhe andhere mein rakhne ke bajaye is mushkil waqt mein unka saath lene ka soch rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi thik rahega. Akele lene se toh despair hi badh raha tha. Main unhe bataunga ki main lad raha hoon, bas thoda waqt chahiye. Shukriya meri baat sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final affirmation of his strength in vulnerability and connection to his family.
text: Apne darr ko qubool karna aur apne parivar ke saath khade hona ek sache aspirant ki pehchan hai. Aapne is mushkil ghadi mein bahut himmat dikhayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra despair duba raha hai
text: Koshish puri hai. Kal bank jaunga. Aaj raat shayad thodi neend aa jaye, kyunki lag raha hai ki wo gehra despair duba raha tha jo, ab thoda halka ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens F (feeling quality) to acknowledge the easing of the flood as the session closes.
text: Yeh jaante hue ki aapke paas ab ek rasta hai, aapka mann thoda shaant mehsoos kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main kal update dunga ki bank manager ne kya kaha. Bas umeed hai ki cheezein sudhar jayein. Aaj ka din toh nikal gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final restatement using Lens E (softly naming implied hope) before closing.
text: Aap is umeed ke saath kal ki shuruat karenge ki cheezein sambhali ja sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Ab bank ki tension hai par breakdown wala darr nahi. Main kal phir baat karunga. Goodnight.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm sign-off and validation of his shift in state.
text: Aap ne aaj apne bojh ko samajhne ki bahut badi koshish ki hai. Goodnight, apna khyal rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Main kal baat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing restatement of intent to continue support.
text: Hum kal phir se baat karenge jab aap bank se ho aayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zaroor. Dhanyawad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final brief sign-off.
text: Khayal rakhiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan kist bounce ho gayi hai aur main wahi sunn hokar baith gaya, mujhse saans bhi nahi li ja rahi. PSC prep ke itne saalon baad ye zillat dekh kar dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas neighborhood shame ka darr flood kar raha hai. Main koi backup plan ya agla kadam nahi soch sakta, bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the quality of emotional overwhelm using Lens F to match Sequential coping.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise charo taraf ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jo tumhe bilkul sunn kar gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bilkul wahi. Sab log mujhse itni umeed lagaye baithe the aur ab ye sab dekh kar lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya. Ye ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki kis taraf dekhun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of effort leading to this point.
text: Itne saalon ki PSC ki kadi mehnat ke baad achanak is mod par aana tumhe bohot zyada bhari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log kya kahenge? Mere doston ki naukri lag gayi, aur main yahan bank calls utha raha hoon. Ye neighborhood shame mujhe ghar se nikalne nahi degi. Sabko pata chal jayega ki loan kist bounce hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applying Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of social judgment and stigma response protocol.
text: Padosiyon ke beech image kharab hone ka darr tumhe bohot pareshan kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Main ghar walon ko kya muh dikhaunga? Unhone khet girvi rakh kar paise diye the prep ke liye. Ab ye kist bounce hona matlab unki izzat mitti mein milna hai. Phir se wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question about the specific pressure of the backup plan/stressor emerging.
text: Jab ye kist aur khet ka khayal dimaag mein aata hai, toh kya tumhe backup plans ke bare mein sochne ki taqat mil pati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, bilkul nahi. Bas lagta hai ki koi raasta hi nahi bacha. PSC ke chakkar mein baaki sab chhod diya. Aaj EMI bounce hui, kal bank wale ghar aayenge. Maine sab bigad diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the role of being the family's hope and the duty associated with the prep.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki parivaar ki saari umeedon aur khet ki zimmedari ko sambhalne mein tumse kahin koi chook ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Mujhe bohot ganda lag raha hai. Itne saalon ki mehnat ka ye phal mila? Main kya kar raha hoon apni life ke saath? Wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai, jaise sab ruk gaya ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of quiet resignation typical of C1/C5 + Sequential.
text: Lagta hai is sab ke beech tum ek quiet resignation aur bebasi mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas thak gaya hoon ladte ladte. Neighborhood mein sab puchenge toh kya kahunga? 'Bete ka selection nahi hua?' Ye zillat bardasht nahi hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling as culturally normal for a PSC aspirant in the Hindi Belt.
text: PSC prep ke dauran jab financial aur social pressure ek saath aata hai, toh itni gehri sharam mehsoos hona bilkul normal hai; ye tumhari worth ka faisla nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Kaash maine backup plan rakha hota. Ab bank walon ka phone uthane mein bhi darr lagta hai. Wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai, jaise main ek andhere kuve mein hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote about aspirants and financial stress.
text: Aspirants mein loan aur family debt ka ye pressure bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki humari society mein failure ko ek stigma ki tarah dekha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach hai, koi nahi bolta. Sab bas result puchte hain. Par ab main aur nahi bhaag sakta. Ab kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya is situation se nikalne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable steps for immediate relief.
text: Tum 5 minute ke liye thande paani se chehra dho sakte ho, ya bank ke messages ko abhi ke liye mute kar ke ek paper par sirf agle ek ghante ka plan likh sakte ho. Kaunsa doable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani wala theek hai, dimaag thoda thanda hoga. Baaki sab toh bohot bhari lag raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the facial washing suggestion.
text: Pehle washroom jao… chehre par thanda paani dalo… bas us thandak ko mehsus karo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda sa hosh aaya hai. Par kist toh wahi hai. Bank walo se kaise baat karunga? Batao kya karoon aage?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe of bank procedures.
text: Bank ki kist bounce hona ek financial process hai, ye koi criminal act nahi hai. Banks ke paas hamesha repayment options hote hain jo wo sirf tab batate hain jab hum unse baat karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe toh laga wo ghar pe aa jayenge sabke saamne. Neighborhood shame ka darr hi toh duba raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of public discovery.
text: Tumhe ye darr sataye ja raha hai ki bank ke chakkar mein tumhari personal life padosiyon ke liye ek tamasha na ban jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Log toh bas mauka dhundte hain baatein banane ka. Par agar main bank se baat kar loon, toh shayad ye ruk jaye? Par himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight the duty of taking a small step.
text: Tum ek zimmedaar tarike se is debt ko handle karna chahte ho par wo darr tumhe pehla kadam lene se rok raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main soch raha hoon kal subah apne ek dost se baat karun jo bank mein hai. Shayad wo raasta dikha de. Par ye sharam...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational aspect of help-seeking.
text: Dost se madad maangne ke khayal ke saath hi tumhari sharam aur izzat ka sawaal phir se khada ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahi hain. Par shayad wohi ek raasta hai. Us gehre sannate se toh behtar hai ki koi action loon. Ab thoda halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing his worth apart from the outcome of the prep.
text: Is bhari waqt mein bhi action lene ka sochna tumhari himmat dikhata hai; loan aur PSC ke results se tumhari asli kabiliyat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Umeed hai. Main kal pakka usse baat karunga. Aaj toh bas so jaunga, dimaag bahut thak gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the need for rest after long exhaustion.
text: Itne dino ki tension aur thakan ke baad ab tumhara sharir aur dimaag bas thoda sukoon chahta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Aaj pehli baar koi solution dikh raha hai, chahe kitna hi chhota kyun na ho. Thank you sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F to mirror the shift in the quality of overwhelm.
text: Us bhari sannate se nikal kar ek chhote se raaste ki taraf badhna tumhe thoda behtar mehsus karwa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah fresh hoke call karunga. Shayad tab tak ye darr bhi thoda kam ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E to mirror the hope for reduced fear.
text: Tum ye umeed kar rahe ho ki thoda rest lene ke baad padosiyon aur bank ka ye khauf utna bhayanak nahi lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zillat toh rahegi, par shayad ab handle kar loon. Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation of resilience in the Hindi Belt context.
text: Is mushkil daur mein bhi apne izzat ke darr ke saath ladte huye aage badhne ka hosla rakhna bohot badi baat hai; apna khayal rakho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, dhanyawad. Chalta hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing using Lens D to acknowledge the end of this turn of interaction.
text: Theek hai, ab tum is bhari din ko khatam karke aaram ki taraf badh rahe ho.
